sections.paragraph:
a root not used as a verb, kindred to the roots גָּבַב (which see), גָּבַהּ, גָּבַח etc., having the sense of elevation, like a mountain or hill; specially, round like a cup or the head (see גָּבִיעַ , גִּבְעֹל , מִגְבָּעָה ); compare قَبُّ head (prince), κεφαλή, caput, capo, all of which come from the same primary stock.

[Derivatives, the following words, also גְּבִיעַ, מִגְבָּעָה.]
